base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of simon_death — a character from 1986 castlevania. collapsing-to-ground then prone. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 2-frame death — collapsing-to-ground then prone; triggers game-over sequence
